subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the Call from the right of the snow-white Spot, from the Divine Lote-Tree: Verily, there is none other God but Me, the Single, the All-Knowing [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ان استمع الندآء عن یمین البقعه البیضاء من سدره المنتهی انه لا اله الا انا الفرد الخبیر
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers, @prophecy and fulfillment, @the concourse on high
